title: Asunción
overview: In a small Jalisco town, devotion to the Virgin of the Assumption shapes its identity. Through testimonies, reenactments, and modern festivities, this docudrama explores her spiritual and cultural impact, uniting a community through faith and tradition.

trailers.title: Teaser de "Asunción", la reina de Jalostotitlán.
